_meta.what: Mutation-score ratchet baselines for silver-core-maestro-sdk (same discipline as the agent SDK's mutation-ratchet.json, keeper order 2026-07-13: floors are only-up; lowering one requires a keeper ruling). The weekly sdk-mutation-ratchet workflow re-measures each target and REDS below floor.
_meta.score: Stryker mutation score = (killed + timeout) / (killed + timeout + survived + noCoverage) * 100; compile/runtime-error mutants excluded

history.2026-07-18 ledger-state seeded: state.ts (task-ledger pure core: closed transition graph + retry arithmetic, SCS-REQ orchestrator-sdk §4) seeded at 100.00 after one kill round (92.77 -> 100.00: error-message byte pins + negative/zero/non-finite backoff-policy boundary tests; 83 killed, 0 survived).
history.2026-07-18 campaigns 3-6 seeded: schedule-spec seeded at 100.00 (kill round: empty-id own-guard message pin + cap=1 boundary; 173 killed). workflow-graph seeded at 97.14 (kill round: exact cycle-path message pin killed the prefix-slice mutant; 3 survivors are a documented equivalence class: path-array seed junk is always stripped by the slice, finished-set memoization is performance-only in a DAG, optional chaining guards a validated-present map hit). goal-decision seeded at 100.00 (guard-message byte pin; 22 killed).
history.2026-07-18 keeper todo item 5 — every mo: delivery-channel seeded at 100.00 (first measure 96.67; kill round: byte-exact pin on the empty-body TypeError message; 30 killed). workflow-load (new module, campaign 7 declarative loading) seeded at 100.00 (first measure 71.83; kill round: exact guard-message pins for empty/non-string/non-object sources, format-forcing vs sniffing asymmetry tests, fence trailing-space regex pin, GraphError-vs-generic wrapper prefix asymmetry, plus removal of the dead `?? ''` fallback behind an always-participating capture group; 69 killed). All five module families (ledger/schedule/goal/workflow/delivery) now carry at least one ratchet target.
history.2026-07-18 audit-r1 fixes re-measured: Post audit-round-1 fixes: ledger-state holds 100.00 (87 killed); workflow-graph rises 97.14 -> 97.84 (135 killed + 1 timeout, same 3 equivalence-class survivors); schedule-spec measures 99.49 within the 100 floor's 0.75pp tolerance (190 killed + 6 timeout, 1 survivor = the floor+1/-1 steps mutant made behaviorally equivalent by the C1 advance loop, which re-derives the same lattice point; the C1 fix replaced an untestable 8-iteration escape with deterministic flatness detection and deleted firesBetween's unreachable in-loop guard). Floors unchanged.
